Handmade in Egypt · One knot at a time

Bags dyed
like the tide,
knotted by hand.

Sol & Strand crochets each bag from hand-dip-dyed t-shirt yarn and finishes it in gold hardware — no two ombré fades are ever quite the same.

Shop the collection Our story
Tidepool Bag — sky to sand
Our craft

Every bag starts as plain cotton jersey — then it meets the dye bath.

We hand-cut and hand-dye t-shirt yarn in small batches, letting each skein fade gradually from one shade into the next. Then it's crocheted, stitch by stitch, into a structured silhouette and finished with polished gold chain and a signature brass tag.

The result: a bag that carries a little bit of the coastline in its color, and a lot of hours in its hands.

100%Hand-dyed yarn
6+Signature colorways
1-of-1Fade on every piece

The Collection

Six colorways, all hand-dyed and hand-knotted. Reserve a piece — each one is made in limited quantity.

How it's made

From skein to strand

Three steps, all done by hand, in small batches out of our studio.

Hand-dyed

Cotton jersey yarn is dip-dyed in small batches, so every fade shifts slightly from the last.

Hand-knotted

Each bag is crocheted stitch by stitch into a structured body that holds its shape.

Gold-finished

Polished chain straps and a brass Sol & Strand tag finish every piece.

Made to order

Don't see your color?

We take custom dye requests for most silhouettes — send us a message on Instagram and we'll talk shades.
